title: Project Wiki Retrieval Contract
description: Defines the request and response shape for knowledge base retrieval in SaaS and API contexts.

query.description: The user question or search intent.

source_filter.description: Restrict retrieval to specific source collections. Examples: knowledge_base, docs, examples, decisions.

max_results.description: Maximum number of retrieval hits to return.

retrieval_mode.description: Direct: read known files. Lexical: exact keyword match. Semantic: intent-based similarity. Hybrid: lexical + semantic + rerank.

include_parent_context.description: When true, expand each hit to include its parent section or file context.

locale.description: Preferred language for results when the knowledge base is multilingual.

snapshot_id.description: Optional knowledge base snapshot version. When omitted, use the latest version.

chunk_id.description: Unique identifier for this retrieval unit.

source_path.description: File path or knowledge base path of the source document.

section_path.description: Hierarchical path within the document. Example: 'Authentication > Session Management > Refresh Strategy'.

parent_context.description: Larger surrounding context when include_parent_context is true.

coverage_assessment.description: How well the knowledge base covers the query. High: strong evidence found. Medium: partial coverage. Low: weak or tangential hits. None: no relevant results.

fallback_needed.description: True when knowledge base coverage is insufficient and external/LLM knowledge should supplement.

fallback_reason.description: Why fallback is needed. Only present when fallback_needed is true.

snapshot_id.description: The knowledge base snapshot version used for this retrieval.

total_candidates.description: Total number of candidate hits before filtering and ranking.
